description_long: This is a realistic model of a crab, featuring a robust, rounded cephalothorax with a reddish-orange coloration and a lighter, almost white underside. The crab has two prominent, asymmetrical claws (chelae) that are large and white-tipped, with visible spines and textured surfaces. Its eight walking legs are slender, jointed, and covered in fine spines, giving a spiky appearance, and are arranged symmetrically on either side of the body. The eyes are small, dark, and set on short stalks at the front of the cephalothorax, providing a wide field of vision. The surface of the shell appears hard and slightly glossy, with subtle roughness and natural patterning. This crab would be a striking and recognizable object if encountered in an urban environment, such as a seafood market or restaurant display.
description: A lifelike crab with a reddish-orange shell, large white-tipped claws, and spiny, jointed legs. Its hard, glossy surface and detailed anatomy make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's broad cephalothorax, both large claws raised, and all eight spiny legs splayed outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height and thickness of the claws, the layered legs, and the crab's arched body profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the crab's lighter underside, the symmetry of the legs, and the claws angled outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the claws' curvature, the segmentation of the legs, and the crab's compact body.
